walnut-pie-with-chocolate-syrup-argiro.name: Walnut Pie With Chocolate Syrup
instructions: Preheat the evening to 170°C in resistance.
Butter a round baking pan of 32 cm or a long one of 22×36 cm.
In a bowl, add the nuts, toast, cocoa, chocolate, baking powder, cinnamon and clove and mix them together.
In the mixer's bowl, beat the butter and sugar for 4 to 5 minutes until the mixture hangs.
Add the yolks to drink.
Add lemon zest and cognac.
Finally, add the solid materials and mix gently with a spatula.
In a clean bowl, beat the whites with salt in a tight meringue.
Add some meringue to the mixture, gently fold it with a spatula, with moves from the bottom up.
Pour the mixture into the buttered baking pan.
Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, until it thickens and turns brown.
When we sink the blade of the knife into its center, it must come out clean and dry.
Let it cool well.
Drill the entire surface with souvli to water with the chocolate syrup.

warm-grilled-peach-and-kale-salad.name: Warm Grilled Peach And Kale Salad
instructions: Combine red bell pepper, vinegar, onion, oil, honey, ginger, and garlic paste in a jar with a lid. Cover jar, shake, and refrigerate dressing 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.

Place peaches and kale leaves on the preheated grill. Toss kale continuously until softened and lightly charred on the edges, about 5 minutes. Cook and turn peaches until grill marks appear, about 3 minutes per side.
Place cooked kale in a serving bowl and toss with dressing. Top with cooked peaches and goat cheese. Season with salt and pepper. Serve warm.

watermelon-sandwich-teleculinaria.name: Watermelon Sandwich

ingredients.item: 2 slices of bread without a crust
Sal e pimenta preta de moinho q.b.

instructions: Cut the watermelon into four slices and, from the center of each, remove a large square. Cut it in half, diagonally, and let it run down absorbent paper. Eliminate the melon seeds and remove four balls with a medium Parisian spoon.

Cut the avocado in half, eliminate the lump and remove the inside with a spoon. Place in a bowl, mix your bread, broken into pieces, some basil leaves, olive oil and a pinch of salt and pepper. Crush with the magic wand and retrieve the spices.
Bar a watermelon triangle with some avocado cream. Have mozzarella slices on top and rebar with more cream.
Tape with another watermelon triangle, put over a basil leaf and a melon ball and stick with a stick. Repeat with the remaining ingredients to get four sandwiches. Serve them cold.

watermelon-soda-float.name: Watermelon Soda Float
instructions: If the yogurt is very hard, refrigerate until firm but scoopable, about 15 minutes. Working quickly, scoop frozen yogurt into a food processor. Add lime zest and juice and pulse just to combine. Return yogurt to same container, cover, and freeze. DO AHEAD: Frozen yogurt can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

Using a melon baller, scoop out 1 1/2 cups watermelon balls (and cantaloupe balls, if using) into a small bowl. Cover and chill. Cut enough watermelon into 1" pieces to measure 8 cups. Stir sugar and 1/3 cup water in a small bowl until sugar dissolves. Set simple syrup aside.

Purée melon pieces (not balls) in a blender until smooth; strain juice through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring cup or pitcher (you should have about 4 cups juice). Discard solids. Whisk in simple syrup, lime juice, and salt. DO AHEAD: Purée can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.
Add seltzer to watermelon purée. Divide melon balls among tall glasses. Pour watermelon soda over. Top with scoops of frozen lime yogurt. Serve watermelon float with a straw and a long spoon.

wennys-white-cake-shots.name: Wenny's White Cake Shots
instructions: Fill a shaker with ice.
Pour vanilla-flavored vodka and hazelnut liqueur into shaker; cover the shaker and shake until chilled.
Strain into 4 shot glasses.

white-barbecue-sauce.name: White Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, vinegar, lemon juice, hot sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and 2 tsp. water in a medium bowl just to combine.
Mix sugar, garlic powder, onion powder, and hickory smoke powder, if using, in a small bowl, then whisk into mayonnaise mixture. Season sauce generously with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Barbecue sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

white-bean-soup-with-mustard-greens-and-.name: White Bean Soup With Mustard Greens And Parmesan

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: In a large heavy pot, heat olive oil over medium high heat. Add onion and fennel and cook, until fragrant and fennel is softened, 7–8 minutes. Add garlic and mustard greens and season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until greens are wilted, about 5 minutes. Add beans and stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer gently, being careful not to break the beans, until flavors meld and soup is thickened slightly, about 10 minutes. Add Parmesan and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Divide among bowls, topping with more Parmesan if desired. Serve with lemon wedges to season.

white-wine-spritzer.name: White Wine Spritzer
instructions: Pour wine into glasses, and top off with club soda. Serve immediately.

whole-wheat-bread-crumbs.name: Whole Wheat Bread Crumbs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Layer bread slices in a single layer on ungreased baking sheets. Allow a bit of room between slices for warm air to circulate.
Toast bread in the preheated oven, flipping until evenly dry, 30 to 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool completely, 15 to 20 minutes.
Process bread in a food processor until fine. Add Pecorino Romano cheese, parsley, oregano, basil, garlic powder, onion powder, thyme, salt, and sugar and pulse until just combined.

winter-shortcakes.name: Winter Shortcakes

ingredients.prep: cut into  0.5” cubes, chilled in freezer for 10 minutes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Pulse Biscuit Mix and butter in a food processor until mixture resembles coarse meal. Transfer to a large bowl. Add buttermilk; mix to just combine. Add figs and zest; mix to just combine. Transfer to a lightly floured surface; gather into a ball. Knead 4–5 times. Dust with flour as needed to prevent sticking. Roll out to a 7” square about ¾” thick. Cut in half. Cut each half crosswise into 4 rectangles.
Transfer shortcakes to a parchment paper–lined baking sheet. Brush with beaten egg; sprinkle with raw sugar.
Bake shortcakes until firm and golden brown, 13–15 minutes. Let cool slightly on a wire rack. Split; fill with jam and whipped cream.

worlds-now-vegetarian-lasagna.name: World's (now Vegetarian!) Lasagna

ingredients.item: Cooked and crumbled ground meat substitute

instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until tender, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, plant-based sausage, meat substitute crumbles, tomato paste, water, 1 tablespoon parsley, sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, basil, Italian seasoning, fennel seeds, and black pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat; simmer, covered, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 1 1/2 hours.

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook lasagna noodles in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse noodles with cold water.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Meanwhile, combine ricotta, remaining 2 tablespoons parsley, egg, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl.

Spread 1/3 tomato sauce mixture in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Arrange 6 noodles lengthwise over sauce. Spread with 1/2 ricotta mixture. Top with 1/3 mozzarella slices. Spoon 1/3 tomato sauce mixture over mozzarella; sprinkle with 1/4 cup Parmesan. Repeat layers; top with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan. Coat a piece of aluminum foil with cooking spray; cover baking dish, coated-side down.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes. Remove foil; bake until hot and bubbly, about 25 minutes more. Cool 15 minutes before slicing into 12 equal servings.

wrapped-skewers-argiro.name: Wrapped Skewers

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg pig for souvlaki or chicken
1 cucumber tender and thin without many seeds
Some fresh dill & some fresh mint or one of the two
1/2 kg pig for souvlaki or chicken
1 cucumber tender and thin without many seeds
Some fresh dill & some fresh mint or one of the two

instructions: We spend the meat on skewer sticks.
Bake for 3-4 minutes on each side.
In a bowl, add the lemon juice, olive oil, 1/2 cup of water, oregano, some salt and pepper. Mix the marinade.
After marking the skewers on the grill, dip them in the marinade.
Let them stand for at least 20 minutes, put them back on fire and finish baking for a few more minutes.
Bake the pies, fill them with juicy straws and a brave dose of vegetable zajdziki.
Sprinkle with paprika wrap them and serve them warm.
Read my recipe for homemade pies or you can use ready-made commerce.
